releases.label: DR5 cluster catalog
releases.summary: SZ-selected galaxy cluster catalog from ACT 2008-2018 (DR5) maps at 98/150 GHz: 4,195 optically confirmed clusters detected at signal-to-noise > 4 in 13,211 deg2 of sky, with redshifts, UPP-based SZ masses, weak-lensing-recalibrated masses, and cross-matches with redMaPPer and CAMIRA. Served on LAMBDA as v1.1 (position/redshift fixes for three clusters vs. v1.0). Superseded by the DR6 cluster catalog.

releases.label: DR6 lensing
releases.summary: CMB gravitational lensing mass map covering 9,400 deg2, reconstructed from ACT DR6 temperature and polarization data taken 2017-2021, with the lensing power-spectrum likelihood; lensing amplitude measured at 2.3% precision (43 sigma). Map product, no object catalog. Released on LAMBDA as v1 on 2023-11-01 (Madhavacheril et al. 2024; spectrum/likelihood in Qu et al. 2024).

releases.label: DR6 cluster catalog
releases.summary: The largest SZ-selected cluster catalog to date: redshifts and mass estimates for 10,040 clusters (plus 374 candidates without redshifts) over 16,293 deg2, from ACT 2008-2022 data with DES and HSC optical confirmation. Includes a 'Legacy' cosmology subsample (fixed_SNR > 5.5, flags == 0, footprint_Legacy), a multiple-systems catalog, and Nemo selection-function products. v1.0 on LAMBDA; supersedes the DR5 cluster catalog. Reference paper published in the Open Journal of Astrophysics (2026).

releases.label: DR6.02 maps
releases.summary: Final ACT data release: multi-frequency (f090/f150/f220) temperature and polarization maps from 2017-2022 observations covering 19,000 deg2 with a median combined depth of 10 uK-arcmin, plus beams, passbands, NILC component-separated maps, power spectra, likelihoods, and parameter chains (maps: Naess et al., arXiv:2503.14451, no journal DOI yet; power spectra and parameters: Louis et al. 2025, JCAP).
